sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: HKMA's strict stablecoin regime to shape Hong Kong's crypto future
feed.summary: Hong Kong's stablecoins ordinance, which took effect on Friday, puts cryptocurrency's most-traded cash substitute under the same regulatory framework as banks, triggering a rush for a limited number of licences from the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA).
